2026-04-23T05:59:22.1986967Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-23T05:59:22.1987408Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-23T05:59:22.1987966Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-23T05:59:22.1988266Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-23T05:59:22.1988495Z [36;1m[0m

CONSTRAINTS: Maximum 1 issue(s) can be created.","inputSchema":{"additionalProperties":false,"properties":{"body":{"description":"Detailed issue description in Markdown. Labels must exist in the repository.","items":{"type":"string"},"type":"array"},"parent":{"description":"Parent issue number for creating sub-issues. This is the numeric ID from the GitHub URL (e.g., 42 in github.com/owner/repo/issues/42). Can also be a temporary_id (e.g., 'aw_abc123', 'aw_Test123') from a previously created issue in the same workflow run.","type":["number","string"]},"secrecy":{"description":"Confidentiality level of the message content (e.g., \"public\", \"internal\", \"private\").","type":"string"},"temporary_id":{"description":"Unique temporary identifier for referencing this issue before it's created. The title appears as the main heading, so keep it brief and descriptive.","type":"string"}},"required":["title","body"],"type":"object"},"name":"create_issue"},{"description":"Report that a tool or capability needed to complete the task is not available, or share any information you deem important about missing functionality or limitations. This is distinct from noop (no action needed) — it indicates an active failure that prevented the task from running. 2026-04-23T06:02:44.7689415Z {"timestamp":"2026-04-23T06:02:31.2651597Z","direction":"OUT","type":"REQUEST","server_id":"safeoutputs","method":"tools/call","payload":{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"arguments":{"body":"## Documentation Gap\n\n**Package:** `Azure.ResourceManager.FrontDoor`\n**Service directory:** `sdk/frontdoor/Azure.ResourceManager.FrontDoor/`\n**Triggered by:** commit b92bfc5e9 (PR #58439) by @haiyuan-zhang\n\n## What Changed\n\nPR #58439 migrated the Azure Front Door management SDK from AutoRest/Swagger to TypeSpec (MPG — Management Plane Generator). This introduced a new `tsp-location.yaml` pointing to `specification/frontdoor/resource-manager/Microsoft.Network/FrontDoor`, regenerated all code under `src/Generated/`, and bumped the package to `1.5.0-beta.1`. The key resource types now include `FrontDoorResource`, `FrontDoorWebApplicationFirewallPolicyResource`, `FrontDoorRulesEngineResource`, `FrontDoorNetworkExperimentProfileResource`, `FrontendEndpointResource`, and `FrontDoorExperimentResource`.\n\n## Gaps Found\n\n- **No inline code examples in README** — the `## Examples` section only links to a generic samples page; there are no snippet placeholders and no `tests/Samples/` directory with `#region Snippet:` tagged methods\n- **\"Key concepts\" section is empty/generic** — it links to the SDK introduction page but does not describe the FrontDoor-specific resource types and their relationships (FrontDoor → FrontendEndpoints, RulesEngines; WAF Policies; Network Experiment Profiles and Experiments)\n- **CHANGELOG 1.5.0-beta.1 is empty** — the MPG migration is a meaningful change (TypeSpec-based regeneration, new API shape) and should be documented under `### Other Changes` or `### Features Added`\n- **No `tests/Samples/` directory** — there are auto-generated samples under `tests/Generated/Samples/` but no hand-authored sample files with snippet markers usable by `Update-Snippets.ps1`\n\n\u003cdetails\u003e\n\u003csummary\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e📐 Implementation Guide\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/summary\u003e\n\nThis section contains step-by-step instructions for a coding agent to implement the changes described above.\n\n### Step 1: Modify files\n\n#### 1a. Update `sdk/frontdoor/Azure.ResourceManager.FrontDoor/README.md`\n\nEdit the file. Replace the generic `## Key concepts` section and update `## Examples` as shown below.\n\n**Replace** the existing `## Key concepts` block:\n```markdown\n## Key concepts\n\nKey concepts of the Microsoft Azure SDK for .NET can be found [here](https://azure.github.io/azure-sdk/dotnet_introduction.html).\n```\n\n**With:**\n```markdown\n## Key concepts\n\n`Azure.ResourceManager.FrontDoor` provides resource management support for Microsoft Azure Front Door services. The main resource types are:\n\n| Resource class | Description |\n|---|---|\n| `FrontDoorResource` | Represents a Front Door load-balancer/CDN instance with routing rules, backend pools, and frontend endpoints |\n| `FrontendEndpointResource` | A frontend hostname (CNAME) attached to a Front Door |\n| `FrontDoorRulesEngineResource` | A rules-engine configuration that allows advanced request-routing conditions on a Front Door |\n| `FrontDoorWebApplicationFirewallPolicyResource` | A WAF policy that can be linked to a Front Door frontend endpoint |\n| `FrontDoorNetworkExperimentProfileResource` | A Network Experiment profile used to measure latency between clients and Azure endpoints |\n| `FrontDoorExperimentResource` | An individual experiment inside a Network Experiment profile |\n\nAll resource instances are obtained through an `ArmClient`:\n\n```C# Snippet:FrontDoor_GetArmClient\nArmClient client = new ArmClient(new DefaultAzureCredential());\n```\n```\n\n**Replace** the existing `## Examples` block:\n```markdown\n## Examples\n\nCode samples for using the management library for .NET can be found in the following locations\n- [.NET Management Library Code Samples](https://aka.ms/azuresdk-net-mgmt-samples)\n```\n\n**With:**\n```markdown\n## Examples\n\n### Create or update a Front Door\n\n```C# Snippet:FrontDoor_CreateOrUpdate\n```\n\n### Get a WAF Policy\n\n```C# Snippet:FrontDoor_GetWafPolicy\n```\n\n### List all Front Doors in a subscription\n\n```C# Snippet:FrontDoor_ListAll\n```\n```\n\n#### 1b. Update `sdk/frontdoor/Azure.ResourceManager.FrontDoor/CHANGELOG.md`\n\nEdit the file. Fill in the empty `1.5.0-beta.1 (Unreleased)` section:\n\n**Replace:**\n```markdown\n## 1.5.0-beta.1 (Unreleased)\n\n### Features Added\n\n### Breaking Changes\n\n### Bugs Fixed\n\n### Other Changes\n```\n\n**With:**\n```markdown\n## 1.5.0-beta.1 (Unreleased)\n\n### Other Changes\n\n- Migrated SDK code generation from AutoRest to TypeSpec (Management Plane Generator). The public API surface is unchanged; internal serialization and client pipeline infrastructure now use the TypeSpec-based generator.\n```\n\n### Step 2: Add or update code snippets\n\nCreate a new file at `sdk/frontdoor/Azure.ResourceManager.FrontDoor/tests/Samples/Sample1_FrontDoor.cs` with the following content:\n\n```csharp\n// Copyright (c) Microsoft Corporation. All rights reserved.\n// Licensed under the MIT License.\n\nusing System;\nusing System.Threading.Tasks;\nusing Azure.Core;\nusing Azure.Identity;\nusing Azure.ResourceManager;\nusing Azure.ResourceManager.FrontDoor;\nusing Azure.ResourceManager.FrontDoor.Models;\nusing Azure.ResourceManager.Resources;\nusing NUnit.Framework;\n\nnamespace Azure.ResourceManager.FrontDoor.Tests.Samples\n{\n    public class Sample1_FrontDoor\n    {\n        [Test]\n        [Ignore(\"Only verifying that the sample builds\")]\n        public async Task GetArmClient()\n        {\n            #region Snippet:FrontDoor_GetArmClient\n            ArmClient client = new ArmClient(new DefaultAzureCredential());\n            #endregion\n        }\n\n client = new ArmClient(new DefaultAzureCredential());\n            string subscriptionId = \"\u003csubscription-id\u003e\";\n            string resourceGroupName = \"\u003cresource-group\u003e\";\n            string frontDoorName = \"\u003cfrontdoor-name\u003e\";\n\n            ResourceGroupResource resourceGroup = await client\n                .GetSubscriptionResource(new ResourceIdentifier($\"/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}\"))\n                .GetResourceGroupAsync(resourceGroupName);\n\n            FrontDoorCollection frontDoors = resourceGroup.GetFrontDoors();\n\n            FrontDoorData data = new FrontDoorData(new AzureLocation(\"global\"))\n            {\n                FriendlyName = frontDoorName,\n            };\n\n            ArmOperation\u003cFrontDoorResource\u003e lro = await frontDoors.CreateOrUpdateAsync(\n                WaitUntil.Completed,\n                frontDoorName,\n                data);\n            FrontDoorResource frontDoor = lro.Value;\n            Console.WriteLine($\"Created Front Door: {frontDoor.Data.Name}\");\n            #endregion\n        }\n\n        [Test]\n        [Ignore(\"Only verifying that the sample builds\")]\n        public async Task GetWafPolicy()\n        {\n            #region Snippet:FrontDoor_GetWafPolicy\n            ArmClient client = new ArmClient(new DefaultAzureCredential());\n            string subscriptionId = \"\u003csubscription-id\u003e\";\n            string resourceGroupName = \"\u003cresource-group\u003e\";\n            string policyName = \"\u003cpolicy-name\u003e\";\n\n            ResourceGroupResource resourceGroup = await client\n                .GetSubscriptionResource(new ResourceIdentifier($\"/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}\"))\n                .GetResourceGroupAsync(resourceGroupName);\n\n            FrontDoorWebApplicationFirewallPolicyResource policy =\n                await resourceGroup\n                    .GetFrontDoorWebApplicationFirewallPolicies()\n                    .GetAsync(policyName);\n\n            Console.WriteLine($\"WAF Policy mode: {policy.Data.PolicySettings?.Mode}\");\n            #endregion\n        }\n\n        [Test]\n        [Ignore(\"Only verifying that the sample builds\")]\n        public async Task ListAll()\n        {\n            #region Snippet:FrontDoor_ListAll\n            ArmClient client = new ArmClient(new DefaultAzureCredential());\n            string subscriptionId = \"\u003csubscription-id\u003e\";\n\n            SubscriptionResource subscription = await client\n                .GetSubscriptionResource(new ResourceIdentifier($\"/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}\"))\n                .GetAsync();\n\n            await foreach (FrontDoorResource frontDoor in subscription.GetFrontDoorsAsync())\n            {\n                Console.WriteLine(frontDoor.Data.Name);\n            }\n            #endregion\n        }\n    }\n}\n```\n\n### Step 3: Verify README structure\n\nThe README currently has all required sections. 2026-04-23T06:02:44.8172803Z server:unified callBackendTool: serverID=safeoutputs, toolName=create_issue, args=map[body:## Documentation Gap
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8173224Z 
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8173351Z **Package:** `Azure.ResourceManager.FrontDoor`
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8173743Z **Service directory:** `sdk/frontdoor/Azure.ResourceManager.FrontDoor/`
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8174171Z **Triggered by:** commit b92bfc5e9 (PR #58439) by @haiyuan-zhang
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8174412Z 
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8174492Z ## What Changed
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8174610Z 
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8177088Z PR #58439 migrated the Azure Front Door management SDK from AutoRest/Swagger to TypeSpec (MPG — Management Plane Generator). This introduced a new `tsp-location.yaml` pointing to `specification/frontdoor/resource-manager/Microsoft.Network/FrontDoor`, regenerated all code under `src/Generated/`, and bumped the package to `1.5.0-beta.1`. The key resource types now include `FrontDoorResource`, `FrontDoorWebApplicationFirewallPolicyResource`, `FrontDoorRulesEngineResource`, `FrontDoorNetworkExperimentProfileResource`, `FrontendEndpointResource`, and `FrontDoorExperimentResource`.
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8179184Z 
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8179262Z ## Gaps Found
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8179368Z 
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8180126Z - **No inline code examples in README** — the `## Examples` section only links to a generic samples page; there are no snippet placeholders and no `tests/Samples/` directory with `#region Snippet:` tagged methods
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8181883Z - **"Key concepts" section is empty/generic** — it links to the SDK introduction page but does not describe the FrontDoor-specific resource types and their relationships (FrontDoor → FrontendEndpoints, RulesEngines; WAF Policies; Network Experiment Profiles and Experiments)
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8183545Z - **CHANGELOG 1.5.0-beta.1 is empty** — the MPG migration is a meaningful change (TypeSpec-based regeneration, new API shape) and should be documented under `### Other Changes` or `### Features Added`
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8184915Z - **No `tests/Samples/` directory** — there are auto-generated samples under `tests/Generated/Samples/` but no hand-authored sample files with snippet markers usable by `Update-Snippets.ps1`
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8185725Z 
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8185802Z <details>
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8186117Z <summary><strong>📐 Implementation Guide</strong></summary>
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8186357Z 
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8186675Z This section contains step-by-step instructions for a coding agent to implement the changes described above.
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8187088Z 
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8187170Z ### Step 1: Modify files
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8187311Z 
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8187500Z #### 1a. Update `sdk/frontdoor/Azure.ResourceManager.FrontDoor/README.md`
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8187786Z 
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8188048Z Edit the file. Replace the generic `## Key concepts` section and update `## Examples` as shown below.
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8188415Z 
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8188530Z **Replace** the existing `## Key concepts` block:
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8188811Z ```markdown
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8188983Z ## Key concepts
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8189095Z 
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8189475Z Key concepts of the Microsoft Azure SDK for .NET can be found [here](https://azure.github.io/azure-sdk/dotnet_introduction.html).
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8190003Z ```
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8190092Z 
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8190165Z **With:**
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8190328Z ```markdown
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8190492Z ## Key concepts
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8190597Z 
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8191162Z `Azure.ResourceManager.FrontDoor` provides resource management support for Microsoft Azure Front Door services. The main resource types are:
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8191700Z 
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8191790Z | Resource class | Description |
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8192020Z |---|---|
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8192506Z | `FrontDoorResource` | Represents a Front Door load-balancer/CDN instance with routing rules, backend pools, and frontend endpoints |
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8193217Z | `FrontendEndpointResource` | A frontend hostname (CNAME) attached to a Front Door |
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8203007Z | `FrontDoorRulesEngineResource` | A rules-engine configuration that allows advanced request-routing conditions on a Front Door |
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8203915Z | `FrontDoorWebApplicationFirewallPolicyResource` | A WAF policy that can be linked to a Front Door frontend endpoint |
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8204832Z | `FrontDoorNetworkExperimentProfileResource` | A Network Experiment profile used to measure latency between clients and Azure endpoints |
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8205795Z | `FrontDoorExperimentResource` | An individual experiment inside a Network Experiment profile |
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8206176Z 
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8206340Z All resource instances are obtained through an `ArmClient`:
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8206581Z 
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8206679Z ```C# Snippet:FrontDoor_GetArmClient
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8207020Z ArmClient client = new ArmClient(new DefaultAzureCredential());
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8207338Z ```
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8207499Z ```
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8207589Z 
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8207698Z **Replace** the existing `## Examples` block:
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8207971Z ```markdown
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8208139Z ## Examples
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8208235Z 
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8208502Z Code samples for using the management library for .NET can be found in the following locations
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8209092Z - [.NET Management Library Code Samples](https://aka.ms/azuresdk-net-mgmt-samples)
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8209485Z ```
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8209572Z

2026-04-23T06:02:44.8212229Z

2026-04-23T06:02:44.8213165Z

2026-04-23T06:02:44.8215166Z 
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8215242Z ### Other Changes
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8215350Z 
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8216340Z - Migrated SDK code generation from AutoRest to TypeSpec (Management Plane Generator). The public API surface is unchanged; internal serialization and client pipeline infrastructure now use the TypeSpec-based generator.
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8217193Z ```
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8217280Z 
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8217375Z ### Step 2: Add or update code snippets
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8217548Z 
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8217953Z Create a new file at `sdk/frontdoor/Azure.ResourceManager.FrontDoor/tests/Samples/Sample1_FrontDoor.cs` with the following content:
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8218446Z 
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8218513Z ```csharp
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8218881Z // Copyright (c) Microsoft Corporation. All rights reserved.
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8219205Z // Licensed under the MIT License.
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8219370Z

2026-04-23T06:02:44.8221092Z using Azure.Resource
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8221284Z ...
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8221497Z (truncated, showing first 65536 bytes of 92071 total)
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8222011Z ##[endgroup]
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8222341Z ##[group]tools.json (4727 bytes)
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8222560Z {
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8222721Z   "servers": {
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8222898Z     "github": [
2026-04-23T06:02:44.8223070Z       {
